attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who commits to early moves, then relies on superior finishing speed in small group sprints from distance rather than late solo attacks.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to determine team setup patterns; appears to operate independently once in breakaway situations, prioritizing cooperative riding over aggressive distancing.
terrain_preference: Moderate climbing terrain where disciplined breakaway groups can time-trial to hold organized pelotons; finishes require sprint speed over pure climbing power.
vulnerability: Likely struggles in disorganized or aggressive late-race scenarios requiring repeated accelerations; success depends on breakaway cooperation and peloton disorganization.
key_patterns: Commits to early breakaway formations rather than waiting for late attacks
Prioritizes cooperative riding and time-trialling discipline within breakaway groups
Relies on elite finishing speed to win from small groups rather than solo efforts
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from 2022 shows strong form, but insufficient recent data to assess trajectory
